mapper.sql: o.id AS id, o.order_no AS orderNo, o.passenger_id AS passengerId, o.driver_id AS driverId, o.vehicle_id AS vehicleId, o.departure AS departure, o.departure_lng AS departureLng, o.departure_lat AS departureLat, o.destination AS destination, o.dest_lng AS destLng, o.dest_lat AS destLat, o.distance AS distance, o.price AS price, o.dispatch_score AS dispatchScore, o.status AS status, CASE o.status WHEN 0 THEN '待接单' WHEN 1 THEN '已接单' WHEN 2 THEN '进行中' WHEN 3 THEN '进行中' WHEN 4 THEN '已完成' WHEN 5 THEN '乘客取消' WHEN 6 THEN '司机取消' ELSE '未知' END AS statusText, COALESCE(o.driver_score, di.score) AS driverScore, COALESCE(o.driver_level, di.level) AS driverLevel, CASE COALESCE(o.driver_level, di.level) WHEN 3 THEN '金牌' WHEN 2 THEN '银牌' WHEN 1 THEN '普通' ELSE '普通' END AS driverLevelText, o.complete_time AS completeTime, o.cancel_time AS cancelTime, o.cancel_reason AS cancelReason, o.is_evaluated AS isEvaluated, o.is_complained AS isComplained, CASE WHEN de.id IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS driverEvaluated, o.create_time AS createTime, o.update_time AS updateTime, su_p.real_name AS passengerName, su_p.phone AS passengerPhone, su_d.real_name AS driverName, su_d.phone AS driverPhone, v.plate_number AS plateNumber, v.brand AS vehicleBrand, v.model AS vehicleModel, v.color AS vehicleColor, CONCAT_WS(' ', NULLIF(v.brand, ''), NULLIF(v.model, ''), NULLIF(v.color, '')) AS vehicleInfo, di.online_status AS onlineStatus, CASE di.online_status WHEN 1 THEN '在线' WHEN 2 THEN '处罚中' ELSE '离线' END AS onlineStatusText
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM order_info o LEFT JOIN sys_user su_p ON o.passenger_id = su_p.id LEFT JOIN sys_user su_d ON o.driver_id = su_d.id LEFT JOIN vehicle_info v ON o.vehicle_id = v.id AND v.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN driver_info di ON o.driver_id = di.user_id LEFT JOIN driver_evaluation de ON o.id = de.order_id WHERE o.id = #{orderId} LIMIT 1
